sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54672" key="katanwtisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατανωτ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n54672.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who despises</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παντὸς δικαίου</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dicaearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
